summary: Iteration 27: Comprehensive Regression + Portal Home Cleanup + Kids Checkout Bug Fix - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All 14 features working correctly.

test_1_portal_home.details: Portal Home loads with greeting ('Good evening, Maria'), quick actions (Give Now, My Groups, Upcoming Events), streak card (1 Week Streak), upcoming events with dates

test_2_date_formatting.details: Events display dates correctly as 'APR 5' - no 'INVALID DATE' or improper formatting. formatDate handles null/undefined dates with fallback to 'TBD'

test_3_kids_checkin.details: Kids Zone loads with Duolingo-style UI - green header, 'Sunday School Adventures' subtitle, DiceBear avatars for children (charlotte hinojosa, TEST_Tommy Test, TEST_Sarah Explorer), pickup codes displayed

test_4_portal_groups.details: Portal Groups page loads with DISCOVER MORE GROUPS section, group cards with leader info, schedules, member counts. Chat button appears only on joined groups (as designed)

test_5_group_chat.details: Group Chat works - tested via Admin dashboard. Messages display with sender names (Abundant Church Admin with 'Admin' badge), timestamps, date separators ('Today'). Chat input and send button functional

test_6_portal_events.details: Events page has hero banner ('COMING UP', 'Sun, Apr 5'), 7 category pills (All Events, Worship, Women, Men, Youth, Community, Conferences), event cards with capacity bars (35/50 spots), 'You're Registered!' badge

test_7_merch_recommender_button.details: Floating sparkle button (data-testid='merch-recommender-btn') visible at bottom-right of Merch page

test_8_merch_recommender_chatbot.details: Typing 'popular' returns: 'Our top 3 right now: 1) Faith Over Fear Tee 2) Abundant Life Hoodie 3) Psalm 23 Mug. All crowd favorites!' Panel shows 'Solomon Merch' header

test_9_admin_groups_dashboard_icon.details: Admin Groups page shows dashboard icons (bar chart) on each group card with action buttons

test_10_admin_leader_dashboard.details: Group Leader Dashboard loads with: attendance chart (data-testid='attendance-chart'), at-risk panel (data-testid='at-risk-panel'), embedded GroupChat (data-testid='group-chat'), All Members section (18 total with roles)

test_12_group_messaging_api.details: GET /api/groups/{groupId}/messages returns messages with sender_name, text, created_at. POST creates messages. Empty text rejected with 400

test_13_watch_page.details: Watch page loads with video content - 'The Missing Peace' sermon with Pastor Charles Nieman, 'Watch Now' button, category filters (All, Faith, Family, Leadership, Worship, Growth, Community)

test_14_portal_navigation.details: Navigation works between Home, Kids Check-in, Watch, Merch, Groups, Events, Cafe, Give, Me sections

critical_code_review_comments: Portal Home formatDate fix verified - handles null/undefined dates correctly with fallback
Kids checkout push notification bug fixed (checkin_doc→checkin variable name)
Merch Recommender is UI-only pattern matching (no LLM) - working as designed
Group Chat bidirectional flow working between admin dashboard and portal
seed_data_creation: Backend test created TEST_iter27_message_automated_test message in group messaging
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 features verified in iteration 27. Key fixes confirmed: (1) PortalHome formatDate handles null/undefined dates correctly - no more INVALID DATE. (2) Kids checkout push notification bug fixed. (3) Merch Recommender chatbot working with pattern matching for keywords like 'popular', 'hoodie', 'gift'. (4) Group Chat bidirectional - admin dashboard can send messages that appear in portal. Note: member@abundant.church has no joined groups, so Chat button doesn't appear on Groups page (correct behavior - Chat only shows for joined groups).

mocked_apis.merch_recommender: UI-only pattern matching (no LLM integration) - BY DESIGN
mocked_apis.admin_dashboard_stats: Stats are real from database, not mocked
